statements.sql:
insert into `bravo_contact` (`name`, `email`, `message`, `status`, `create_user`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('Jack Harrison', 'jack287989@gmail.com', 'Hi,

I was reviewing your online presence and noticed a potential opportunity to improve your lead generation through Google Ads.

A well-optimized campaign can help you reach customers who are actively searching for your products or services, resulting in more qualified leads and a better return on ad spend.

I can share a brief proposal outlining campaign recommendations, expected outcomes, and pricing.

Let me know if you'd like the details.

Regards,

Jack', 'sent', '', '2026-06-02 17:59:00', '2026-06-02 17:59:00')
bindings:
Hi,

I was reviewing your online presence and noticed a potential opportunity to improve your lead generation through Google Ads.

A well-optimized campaign can help you reach customers who are actively searching for your products or services, resulting in more qualified leads and a better return on ad spend.

I can share a brief proposal outlining campaign recommendations, expected outcomes, and pricing.

Let me know if you'd like the details.

Regards,

Jack

    Let me know if you'd like the details.\r\n

    Regards,\r\n
    \r\n
    Jack
    """
